nasb.text: from twenty years old and upward, whoever is able to go out to war in Israel, you and Aaron shall number them by their armies.

esv.text: From twenty years old and upward, all in Israel who are able to go to war, you and Aaron shall list them, company by company.

cnv.text: 在以色列中，凡是二十歲及以上，能出去打仗的，你和亞倫要按著他們的隊伍數點他們。

ccb.text: 你和亚伦要一队一队地统计以色列人中二十岁以上、有作战能力的男子。
